properties.name: jeap.vault.kubernetes.role
properties.description: The Vault role used to authenticate against Vault with the Kubernetes authentication method.

properties.name: jeap.vault.kubernetes.kubernetes-path
properties.description: The mount path of the Kubernetes authentication backend in Vault.

properties.name: jeap.vault.kv.backend
properties.description: The mount path of the key-value (KV) secrets backend in Vault used to read secrets from.
